experience.description: Lead engineer on the Edge Runtime team. Shipped the Fluid Compute architecture that reduced cold starts by 60%. Mentored a team of 4 engineers and drove adoption of TypeScript strict mode across the codebase.
highlights: Reduced cold start times by 60% through new Fluid Compute architecture
Led migration of 200k+ functions to new Edge Runtime
Authored internal RFC process now used across engineering

experience.description: Worked on the Payments API team, building the infrastructure that processes billions of dollars annually. Owned the dispute and chargeback system end-to-end.
highlights: Built new dispute resolution API serving 50M+ requests/month
Reduced payment failure rates by 12% through improved retry logic
Contributed to open-source Stripe SDK libraries

experience.description: Early engineer at Linear (pre-launch). Built core product features including the keyboard shortcut system, import tools, and the original mobile apps.
highlights: Designed and built the entire keyboard navigation system
Built Jira, GitHub, and Notion import integrations
Shipped iOS and Android apps from scratch
